channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NYC Board of Elections worker says 'not my job to report anyone' when asked about registering non-citizens
item.description: A New York City election worker told an undercover reporter he would not report non-citizens trying to register to vote, saying "that's not my job."

item.title: Inside world's top science society's convention bashing Trump, pushing DEI, pronouns: 'Felt like a funeral'
item.description: A major scientific society's conference draw sharp criticism for its progressive messaging and vocal criticism of President Donald Trump.

item.title: Mike Lee calls Schumer's 'Jim Crow 2.0' attack on voter ID bill 'paranoid fantasy'
item.description: Senate Democrats compare GOP voter ID push to "Jim Crow 2.0," but Sen. Mike Lee calls the comparison "paranoid fantasy" as the debate intensifies over...

item.title: Air Force One scraps iconic Kennedy-era paint scheme for Trump-approved red, white, blue design
item.description: Air Force One will get a new red, white and dark blue paint scheme as President Trump replaces the light blue design that defined presidential aircraf...

item.title: Billionaire Victoria's Secret mogul Les Wexner to testify in House Jeffrey Epstein probe
item.description: House Oversight Committee staff will travel to Ohio to depose billionaire Les Wexner, who was named as a Jeffrey Epstein co-conspirator in a 2019 FBI ...

item.title: Thousands of CEOs just admitted AI had no impact on employment or productivity—and it has economists resurrecting a paradox from 40 years ago
item.description: In the 1980s, economist Robert Solow made an observation that reminded economists of today’s AI boom: “You can see the computer age everywhere but in ...

item.title: America Seeks Partner, Europe Swipes Left
item.description: There is a kind of romantic streak to U.S. relations with Europe in the Trump era.

item.title: Rubio’s Impressive Tightrope Walk
item.description: The secretary of state stayed true to President Trump while reassuring Europe.

item.title: Trump crackdown drives 80% plunge in immigrant employment, reshaping labor market, Goldman says
item.description: Net immigration averaged approximately 1 million people per year during the 2010s. Not anymore.

item.title: Conservative Law Firm Picks Up Dobbs Litigator To Fuel More Supreme Court Victories
item.description: A key member of the legal team that convinced the Supreme Court to overrule Roe v. Wade has joined a new law firm to pursue a broader range of appella...

item.title: Top Democratic fundraisers sought Jeffrey Epstein's support despite child sex offender conviction
item.description: Jeffrey Epstein was registered as a high-risk sex offender, but it did not matter to the fundraisers working for Democratic leaders Sen. Charles E. Sc...

item.title: Congress Should Close the Big Hospitals Tax Loophole
item.description: Large nonprofit hospital networks are leveraging huge subsidies for financial gains and political advantage.

item.title: White House names new pick for Nevada top federal prosecutor after confirmation trouble
item.description: The Trump administration has selected a new candidate for Nevada's top federal prosecutor after challenges to its first pick's eligibility, marking an...

item.title: J.D. Vance sticks to job at hand -- winning midterms, immigration, Iran -- when pressed about 2028
item.description: Vice President J.D. Vance on Tuesday dodged questions about his ambition to become the GOP presidential nominee in 2028, saying there is still a lot t...

item.title: Corporate Media Give Trans Hockey Game Shooter The ‘Gunperson’ Treatment
item.description: Details of Dorgan's trans identity have been deemed unpublishable by corporate media outlets which refuse to call him a man.

item.title: Billionaire Trump supporter blocks sale of Texas warehouse for use as ICE jail
item.description: Majestic Realty is one of several companies to say no DHS after community backlash.

item.title: Judge blocks deportation of Palestinian activist who led protests at Columbia
item.description: An immigration judge has blocked the Trump administration from deporting Mohsen Mahdawi, a Palestinian graduate student who led protests at Columbia U...

item.title: Hillary Clinton Says Mass Migration Went ‘Too Far’ But Here’s How You Can Tell She Doesn’t Mean It
item.description: Only when elections are at stake do Democrats pretend to notice the consequences of mass migration.

item.title: New Mexico legislators launch 'truth commission' investigation into Jeffrey Epstein's secluded ranch
item.description: State legislators in New Mexico launched an investigation Tuesday into past activity at a secluded desert ranch where financier and sex offender Jeffr...

item.title: Two More Trans Killers Carry Out Atrocities
item.description: There are dots here that should be connected.

item.title: CEO hopefuls have a new rival for the top job: their own board directors
item.description: Internal candidates are increasingly up against their own directors in the CEO succession race.

item.title: Attacking America Abroad, Hillary Clinton Is The Eileen Gu Of Politics
item.description: Hillary was the vessel into which Europeans could pour their refusal to accept American political change.

item.title: Why your boss loves AI and you hate it: Corporate profits are capturing your extra productivity, and your salary isn’t
item.description: As happened with the first factories of the Industrial Revolution, today’s AI boom is boosting output, but most of the gains are flowing to capital, n...

item.title: AOC’s Risible Performance
item.description: AOC’s time at the Munich conference was another reminder that no matter how much she is billed as a rising star, she is still callow and unserious.

item.title: Exclusive: New York Times Hit Piece On ICE Facilities’ Medical Care Is Riddled With Falsehoods, DHS Says
item.description: 'These allegations of illegal aliens being denied proper medical care in ICE custody are FALSE,' Dr. Sean Conley, DHS chief medical officer, told The ...

item.title: Social Security Claiming Strategies for High-Net-Worth Clients
item.description: Social Security claiming is a capital-allocation decision for affluent clients. This analysis weighs taxes, longevity risk, and liquidity trade-offs. ...

item.title: Evolving Your Wealth Management Practice for 2026 and Beyond
item.description: Wealth management’s 2026 outlook: growth will hinge on transparency, integration, and relevance to women and next-generation investors. The post Evolv...

item.title: AI Is Reshaping Bank Risk
item.description: AI is exposing the limits of legacy bank controls, making governance quality critical to resilience and investor confidence. The post AI Is Reshaping ...

item.title: What Makes an Ideal Leveraged Buyout Candidate?
item.description: In competitive PE markets, successful LBOs depend on durable business models, recurring cash flows, defensible market positions, and disciplined targe...

item.title: Rethinking Household Asset Allocation Under Capital Constraints
item.description: Leveraged ETFs aren’t about more risk, they’re about using less capital to achieve a desired risk profile in household portfolios. The post Rethinking...
